MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-13-2010 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MARC RICHARDSON'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEE AS TO THE ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF EXECUTION. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION ONLY AS TO THE FEE FOR ISSUANCE OF THE WRIT OF EXECUTION. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RICHARDSON, MARC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, MATTHEW THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 535 HAIGHT STREET, BEDROOM ON RIGHT, OFF HALLWAY, IN FRONT OF UNIT, S.F. CA. 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
